KYC, KYB, and fraud prevention platform: KYC, KYB, and fraud prevention platform — verify user identities, onboard businesses, run AML/sanctions checks, and detect fraud signals.
Select the AiPrise environment to use: Select the AiPrise environment to use
To get your AiPrise API key:\n1. Log in:
To get your AiPrise API key:
1. Log in to your [AiPrise dashboard](https://app.aiprise.com)
2. Go to **Settings > API Keys**
3. Copy your API key and paste it here
Kicks off a new identity check for a per: Kicks off a new identity check for a person. AiPrise will run the checks defined in your chosen template (e.g. ID document scan, liveness, address).
Generates a secure link you can send to: Generates a secure link you can send to a person so they can complete their identity verification on an AiPrise-hosted page — no extra development needed.
Fetches the current status and outcome o: Fetches the current status and outcome of a person's identity check — whether it is still in progress, approved, or declined.
Returns the information the person enter: Returns the information the person entered and the documents they uploaded during their identity check (e.g. name, date of birth, ID document details).
Manually changes the outcome of an ident: Manually changes the outcome of an identity check — useful when a human reviewer needs to approve or decline a case that AiPrise flagged for manual review.
Kicks off a company background check. Ai: Kicks off a company background check. AiPrise will run the checks defined in your template — which can include company registry lookup, ownership structure (UBO), sanctions screening, and adverse media.
Fetches the current status and outcome o: Fetches the current status and outcome of a company's background check — whether it is still running, approved, or declined.
Returns the company information provided: Returns the company information provided during a business verification — such as company name, registration number, directors, and ownership details.
Runs a verification check on a document: Runs a verification check on a document belonging to an existing business profile. AiPrise will process the uploaded file against the checks defined in the chosen template.
Creates a new business profile in AiPris: Creates a new business profile in AiPrise. The returned profile can then be used to run document checks or other business verifications.
Creates a new user profile in AiPrise. T: Creates a new user profile in AiPrise. The returned profile can then be used for repeated verifications or ongoing monitoring for the same person.
Fetches a user profile from AiPrise by i: Fetches a user profile from AiPrise by its ID — including the person's stored details, tags, linked verification sessions, and metadata.
Fetches a business profile from AiPrise: Fetches a business profile from AiPrise by its ID — including the stored company details, addresses, tags, linked verification sessions, and metadata.
Searches public business registries by n: Searches public business registries by name and country, returning a list of matching companies with their entity IDs, types, and addresses. Useful for looking up a business before creating a profile or running a verification.
Fetches supplementary information collec: Fetches supplementary information collected from the person during a verification — anything beyond the primary identity fields, such as follow-up answers, extra documents, or custom form data.
Lists all documents attached to a busine: Lists all documents attached to a business profile — including file UUIDs, names, S3 URLs, timestamps, document sources, and associated verification sessions.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint
Which set of checks to run. To find this: Which set of checks to run. To find this: log in to AiPrise → go to **Templates** → open the template you want → copy the **Template ID** shown at the top of the page.
Your own identifier for this person — fo: Your own identifier for this person — for example their user ID, email address, or order number. AiPrise stores this alongside the verification so you can match results back to your records.
Which set of checks the person will go t: Which set of checks the person will go through. To find this: log in to AiPrise → go to **Templates** → open the template you want → copy the **Template ID** shown at the top of the page.
The page the person will be sent to afte: The page the person will be sent to after they finish the verification on the AiPrise-hosted form (e.g. a "Thank you" or confirmation page on your website).
The ID of the specific verification to l: The ID of the specific verification to look up. You can get this from the output of the **Start Identity Verification** action, or from the **session_id** field in any webhook payload from AiPrise.
The ID of the verification to retrieve d: The ID of the verification to retrieve data from. You can get this from the output of the **Start Identity Verification** action, or from the **session_id** field in any webhook payload from AiPrise.
The ID of the verification whose decisio: The ID of the verification whose decision you want to change. You can get this from the output of the **Start Identity Verification** action, or from the **session_id** field in any webhook payload from AiPrise.
The outcome you want to set. Choose **Ap: The outcome you want to set. Choose **Approved** to pass the person, **Declined** to reject them, or **Pending** to put the case back into manual review.
Which set of checks to run on the busine: Which set of checks to run on the business. To find this: log in to AiPrise → go to **Templates** → open the template you want → copy the **Template ID** shown at the top of the page.
The ID of the business profile you want: The ID of the business profile you want to verify. This is returned when you create a business profile, or you can look it up using the List Business Profiles action.
The ID of the business verification to l: The ID of the business verification to look up. You can get this from the output of the **Start Business Verification** action, or from the **session_id** field in any webhook payload from AiPrise.
The ID of the business verification to r: The ID of the business verification to retrieve data from. You can get this from the output of the **Start Business Verification** action, or from the **session_id** field in any webhook payload from AiPrise.
The ID of the business profile the docum: The ID of the business profile the document belongs to. You can find this in AiPrise → **Businesses** → open the business → copy the **Profile ID**.
The UUID of the document file that was p: The UUID of the document file that was previously uploaded to AiPrise.
An optional unique identifier for this d: An optional unique identifier for this document input. This value is included in webhook payloads and API responses so you can distinguish between multiple documents.
Your own identifier to associate with th: Your own identifier to associate with this request — for example an order number or internal case ID.
Any additional JSON data you want to sto: Any additional JSON data you want to store alongside this request.
The business name. The legal name is pre: The business name. The legal name is preferred.
An alternate \"doing business as\" name,: An alternate "doing business as" name, if any.
The tax ID for this business (e.g. EIN i: The tax ID for this business (e.g. EIN in the US).
The date the business was formed, in YYY: The date the business was formed, in YYYY-MM-DD format.
The 2-letter ISO country code where the: The 2-letter ISO country code where the business is registered (e.g. US, GB).
The state or province code where the bus: The state or province code where the business is registered (e.g. CA, NY).
A government-issued entity identifier fo: A government-issued entity identifier for this business.
A JSON array of address objects associat: A JSON array of address objects associated with the business.
One or more phone numbers associated wit: One or more phone numbers associated with the business.
One or more email addresses associated w: One or more email addresses associated with the business.
A JSON array of supporting documents or: A JSON array of supporting documents or extra data for this business.
Your own internal identifier for this bu: Your own internal identifier for this business.
A webhook URL that AiPrise will call wit: A webhook URL that AiPrise will call with verification results.
A webhook URL that AiPrise will call with event notifications.
Tag names used to categorize this busine: Tag names used to categorize this business profile.
User's second surname, where applicable: User's second surname, where applicable (e.g. in some Latin American naming conventions).
The complete name. Use this if you do no: The complete name. Use this if you do not have the name split into parts.
User's date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD forma: User's date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format.
Your own internal identifier for this us: Your own internal identifier for this user.
A webhook URL that AiPrise will call wit: A webhook URL that AiPrise will call with event notifications for this profile. Paste the webhook URL from the **Verification Event Received** trigger here.
Tag names used to categorize this user p: Tag names used to categorize this user profile. Tags are created if they do not already exist.
The ID of the user profile to retrieve. You can get this from the output of the **Create User Profile** action, or from the `user_profile_id` field in any webhook payload from AiPrise.
The ID of the business profile to retrie: The ID of the business profile to retrieve. You can get this from the output of the **Create Business Profile** action, or from the `business_profile_id` field in any webhook payload from AiPrise.
The business name to search for. Partial: The business name to search for. Partial matches are supported by AiPrise.
2-letter ISO country code where the busi: 2-letter ISO country code where the business is registered (e.g. US, GB).
Optional state or province code to narro: Optional state or province code to narrow the search (e.g. CA, NY for the US). Leave empty to search the whole country.
The ID of the verification to look up. Y: The ID of the verification to look up. You can get this from the output of the **Start Identity Verification** action
The ID of the business profile whose doc: The ID of the business profile whose documents you want to list. You can get this from the output of the **Create Business Profile** action.
Authorization headers are injected autom: Authorization headers are injected automatically from your connection.
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
HEAD: HEAD
